problem_statement: Clinical trials are expensive, time-consuming, and difficult to optimize.
mission: Build an intelligent platform that helps researchers design, optimize, simulate, and evaluate clinical trials using AI-driven analytics, optimization, and predictive insights.
core_value_proposition: Reduce costs, improve recruitment efficiency, optimize patient cohorts, reduce protocol amendments, and accelerate trial completion.
landing_page_concept: Interactive DNA helix with Three.js and GSAP scroll animations guiding users into the analytics dashboard.
one_sentence_pitch: An AI-powered clinical trial optimization platform that helps researchers design better trials, select better patient cohorts, reduce costs, predict outcomes, and accelerate medical breakthroughs.
